info.title: Sales API
info.description: Aggregate OpenAPI 3.1 document for all enterprise modules, generated from FCG InterfaceSpecs.

get.summary: Get workspaces accessible to a user based on their role assignments
get.description:
Get workspaces accessible to a user based on their role assignments
Flow: user → userRoleSelections → roleWorkspaceSelections → workspaces

Get user's active workspace
Logic: lastActiveWorkspaceId → role default workspace → null

put.description:
Update user's active workspace
Validates user has access before updating

get.summary: Get workspace navigation as hierarchical tree
get.description: Get workspace navigation as hierarchical tree
